name: @linacre/toolbox-mcp
description: Linacre Tool Box — an MCP server exposing linacre.site's privacy-first developer utilities (JSON, Base64, JWT, RegEx, hashing, UUID, password, UK VAT, URL cleaner, timestamp, text tools) to any AI client. Pure, offline, deterministic.
author: David Christopher Linacre <david@linacre.site> (https://www.linacre.site)
